benefits.title: Why partner with our platform?
benefits.item-1-desc: Display your agency directly on the results page exactly when users search for roles within your claimed industry and territory.
benefits.item-2-desc: Connect with professionals on AmIUnderpaid actively seeking better opportunities to increase their MCA score and maximize their salary.
benefits.item-3-desc: Engage directly with hiring managers and companies using BenchmarkMyRole to evaluate their compensation and hiring strategies.
benefits.item-4-desc: Claim a territory exclusively and be the ONLY agency shown to both candidates and clients for that month.
benefits.item-5-desc: Say goodbye to cold outreach. High-quality, motivated candidates and clients come directly to you the moment they opt-in.
benefits.item-6-desc: Scale your reach on your terms. No fixed long-term contracts. Build a custom schedule for the specific regions you want to target.
